task: I’ve got a short note to send about a delay on a project, and I want it to sound clean and professional without being wordy. Can you help me draft something brief that gets to the point and still feels respectful?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a brief, professional version:

> Hi [Client Name] — quick update: the project is taking a bit longer than expected, and I’m working through the last few items now. I expect to send the updated version by [day/time]. Thanks for your patience.

If you want, I can also make it:
- a little firmer
- a little more neutral
- shorter for email or Slack

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Can you make it a touch firmer and a little less apologetic? Something I can send without sounding like I’m overexplaining it.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a firmer, less apologetic version:

> Hi [Client Name] — quick update: the project is taking a bit longer than expected. I’m finishing the remaining items now and expect to send the updated version by [day/time].

If you want, I can also make it:
- even shorter
- more neutral
- slightly warmer

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that’s good. Clean and to the point.
